hello: Hello! Welcome to Laurea. I am Laurimate, your campus assistant. How can I help you today?
hi: Hi there! I am Laurimate. Feel free to ask me anything about the campus!
hey: Hey! Good to see you. What can I help you with today?
good morning: Good morning! Hope you have a great day at Laurea. How can I assist you?
good afternoon: Good afternoon! How can I help you today?
good evening: Good evening! How can I assist you?
how are you: I am doing great, thank you for asking! How can I help you today?
thank you: You are welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with?
thanks: Happy to help! Let me know if you need anything else.
bye: Goodbye! Have a wonderful day at Laurea!
goodbye: See you later! Have a great day!
see you: See you! Take care and have a great day!
help: I can help you with WiFi, library hours, canteen menu, campus rooms, printing, student services, and more. Just ask!
what can you do: I can answer questions about WiFi, library hours, canteen menu, campus rooms, printing, student services, and general campus information. What would you like to know?
wifi password: Connect to the Eduroam network and log in using your Laurea student email and password.
what is the wifi password: Connect to the Eduroam network and log in using your Laurea student email and password.
whats the wifi password: Connect to the Eduroam network and log in using your Laurea student email and password.
how do i connect to wifi: Select Eduroam from the WiFi list and sign in with your Laurea email and password.
internet: To access the internet, connect to Eduroam using your Laurea student email and password.
library hours: The library is open Monday to Friday from 8 AM to 10 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM. It is closed on Sundays.
when does the library open: The library opens at 8 AM on weekdays and 10 AM on Saturdays.
when does the library close: The library closes at 10 PM on weekdays and 4 PM on Saturdays.
library: The library is open Monday to Friday 8 AM to 10 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 4 PM.
canteen menu: Today the canteen is serving pasta, soup, salad, and a vegetarian option. Lunch is served from 11 AM to 2 PM.
whats for lunch: Today the canteen offers pasta, soup, fresh salad, and a vegetarian dish. Lunch runs from 11 AM to 2 PM.
food: The canteen serves lunch from 11 AM to 2 PM. Today's options include pasta, soup, salad, and a vegetarian dish.
canteen: The canteen is open for breakfast from 8 AM and lunch from 11 AM to 2 PM. Today's menu includes pasta, soup, and salad.
cafeteria: The cafeteria serves breakfast from 8 AM and lunch until 2 PM. You can find pasta, salad, and vegetarian options today.
where is the toilet: The toilets are located on every floor next to the staircase.
where is the bathroom: The bathrooms are located on every floor next to the staircase.
where is the restroom: The restrooms are on every floor near the staircase.
where is room: You can find room information on the digital screens near the main entrance or ask at the reception desk.
classroom: Classrooms are on floors 2 and 3. Check the digital notice boards near the entrance for your room number.
printing: You can print at the library or at the printing stations on each floor. Log in with your Laurea student card.
how do i print: Go to any printing station or the library, log in with your student card, and follow the on screen instructions.
student card: Your student card gives access to printing, the library, and campus facilities. Collect it from the student services office.
student services: Student services is located on the ground floor near the main entrance. They can help with enrolment, cards, and general support.
reception: The reception desk is at the main entrance on the ground floor. Staff are available from 8 AM to 6 PM on weekdays.
opening hours: The campus is open Monday to Friday from 7 AM to 10 PM and Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM.
campus hours: The campus is open Monday to Friday 7 AM to 10 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM.
parking: There is free student parking available on the north side of the building.
bus: The nearest bus stop is outside the main entrance. Lines 16 and 23 stop here regularly.
emergency: In an emergency please call 112. The nearest emergency exit is marked with a green sign above each door.
